description:
Migrate every integration test assertion that reads or writes a legacy `.balls/` or `.balls-worktrees/` path under the clone root, so the test suite is layout-tolerant and ready for the cmd_init flip.

## Scope

Categories of assertion sites to update (use `balls::store::Store`-derived paths via the helpers landed in Phase 1B-1, or read repo/project state through `Store` accessors directly):

1. `.balls/state-repo/` references in tests — these are the cross-clone state checkout. `git_state`, `commit_state_repo`, `push` helpers are already layout-aware (Phase 1B-1); the remaining bare `repo.path().join(".balls/state-repo")` joins need to go through `discover_state_repo(repo)`.
2. `.balls/config.json` assertions — both reads (`fs::read_to_string`) and writes (`fs::write` seeding test fixtures). Replace with reads/writes against the per-clone `repo.json` (XDG) once Phase 1B-2 lands.
3. `.balls/tasks/<id>.json` direct file joins (not via `read_task_json` helper) — route through `discover_tasks_dir(repo)` or read via `Store::load_task`.
4. `.balls/local/{claims,lock,plugins}` direct joins — route through `Store::claims_dir()`, `lock_dir()`, `local_plugins_dir()`.

## Affected test files (~30+ from the bl-e802 stash sweep)

Sample (full list discovered by `grep -rln "\.balls/state-repo\|\.balls/config\.json\|\.balls/tasks\|\.balls/local" tests/`):

claim, claim_sync, close_*, conformance_config, coverage_*, delivered_repo, delivery, delivery_remote, doctor, forge_*, forward_compat, gates_compat, init, links, multi_dev_*, plugin_*, prime, ready_*, repair, review_*, sync_*, target_branch, topology, tracker_state.

## Why it can land alone

Each test file is layout-tolerant after migration: it still works against the legacy `bl init` (since `Store::discover` keeps reading legacy when XDG is absent) AND against the future XDG `bl init`. Lands without breaking the suite.

## Dependency

Depends on Phase 1B-2 (the helpers + Store::init_xdg + the layout-aware load_config). Without those the migration target paths do not exist.

## Source

The stash on `work/bl-e802` only carried the `.balls-worktrees/<id>` sweep (Phase 1B-1 scope). The remaining categories are net-new work for this slice. Approach: per file, replace every literal `.balls/...` join with a helper call or `Store` accessor.

## Out of scope

- `bl remaster` XDG-awareness — sibling Phase 1B-7.
- `bl --bare` XDG-awareness — sibling Phase 1B-7.
- `tests/conformance_federated.rs` and `tests/conformance_migrate*.rs` — sibling Phase 1B-4 (their fixtures need bespoke rewiring against the federated tracker shape, not a mechanical helper swap).
title: Phase 1B-3: migrate test assertions off legacy in-repo paths
